title: Scape And Run Parasites Susceptible
description: Allows Coth to effect the player
body:
This mod lets YOU become not just a carrier of call of the hive, but a victim if you sit down and go, I want scape and run parasites to be way more difficult! This is for you. (Although still buggy.) This allows Coth to effect you and eventually kill you. So you will need to start wearing masks, crafting simple cures to stop earlier stages of it.

The commands all start wtih "SRPSUS" so, just type that and you'll have the list of them.
